name: Oreo Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Process Oreos and butter in a food processor and press into a springform pan.
2. Make the filling: Beat cream cheese; add 1 1/4 cups sugar and beat for three minutes.
3. Mix in flour. While beating, add eggs and yolks, mixing until smooth.
4. Add whipping cream and 1 teaspoon vanilla to the mixture.
5. Pour half of the filling into the crust. Sprinkle Oreos on top.
6. Add all remaining ingredients for the filling.
7. Place the pan in a 425-degree oven for 15 minutes.
8. Reduce heat to 225 degrees and bake for 50 minutes.
9. Remove from oven; turn off the oven temperature to 350 degrees.
10. Stir sour cream, 1/4 cup sugar, and 1 teaspoon vanilla together, spread over the cake, and bake for 7 minutes.
11. Remove from oven; cool to room temperature in a draft-free place.
12. Cover and refrigerate overnight or up to 3 days.
13. Before serving, remove sides of the pan and serve chilled.
